security.title: Security
security.email_sub: The email address associated with your account.
security.password_sub_add: Add a password to sign in with email.
security.linked_sub: Sign-in methods connected to your account.
security.toast_pw_set: Password set — you can now sign in with email
security.err_min_8: Password must be at least 8 characters
security.err_google_failed: Google sign-in was cancelled or failed

unlink_modal.title: Unlink Google account?
unlink_modal.sub: You'll no longer be able to sign in with Google. Make sure you remember your email and password before continuing.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.deactivate_sub: Temporarily suspend your account. You can reactivate by contacting support.
danger_zone.deactivate_modal_desc: Your account will be suspended and you will be signed out immediately. Contact support to reactivate.
danger_zone.delete_sub: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. Type your email address below to enable this action.
danger_zone.delete_modal_desc: Your account will be scheduled for permanent deletion in 30 days. Listings and leads may be anonymized or removed.
danger_zone.delete_done: Deletion requested — you have 30 days to cancel by contacting support.
danger_zone.err_deactivate: Could not deactivate account. Please try again.
danger_zone.err_delete: Could not submit deletion request. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.inquiry_alerts_sub: Get notified when someone sends an inquiry
notifications.booking_updates_sub: Receive updates on booking status changes
notifications.weekly_digest_sub: Summary email every Monday with platform news
